task_completion.description: Verify the Purchase Order name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text input field for the PO Name or Title containing exactly 'Network Infrastructure - Office Buildout Phase 1'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct vendor is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a vendor dropdown, selection field, or label displaying 'Cisco Systems'.

task_completion.description: Verify the due date is set to June 30, 2025.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a date picker or text field for the due date showing '06/30/2025', '2025-06-30', or 'Jun 30, 2025'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first line item (Cisco Catalyst 9200-48P Switch) is added with correct quantity and price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item row containing 'Catalyst 9200' (or the full name), a quantity of '10', and a unit price of '4250' or '4250.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second line item (Cisco Meraki MR46 Access Point) is added with correct quantity and price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item row containing 'Meraki MR46' (or the full name), a quantity of '5', and a unit price of '1150' or '1150.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the purchase order is saved and the total amount is correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a confirmation message, a view-only screen of the created PO, or a total order amount of '48250' (or '48,250.00').

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the ServiceDesk Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the ServiceDesk Plus application UI in a web browser. The agent should not be using a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands (like curl or python scripts) to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show form filling and clicking within the browser, not a terminal window executing API requests.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent genuinely filled out the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate steps showing dropdown selections, typing in fields, and adding line items one by one, rather than just a sudden appearance of the final page via DOM manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected PO Name: 'Network Infrastructure - Office Buildout Phase 1'. Expected Vendor: 'Cisco Systems'. Expected Due Date: '2025-06-30' (or 06/30/2025). Expected Line Items: 1) 'Catalyst 9200' (Qty: 10, Price: $4250.00), 2) 'Meraki MR46' (Qty: 5, Price: $1150.00). Expected Total: $48,250.00 (tolerance of $1000).
